keywords.name: char
keywords.description: Single byte signed integer type (-128 to 127)

keywords.name: short
keywords.description: Two byte signed integer type (-32768 to 32767)

keywords.name: int
keywords.description: Two or four byte signed integer type

keywords.name: long
keywords.description: Four byte signed integer type (-2147483648 to 2147483647)

keywords.name: double
keywords.description: Double precision floating point (40-bit CBM format, 5 bytes)

keywords.name: void
keywords.description: No return type or empty parameter list

keywords.name: enum
keywords.description: Enumeration type with named integer constants

keywords.name: const
keywords.description: Read-only qualifier; value cannot be modified

keywords.name: volatile
keywords.description: Volatile qualifier; value may change unexpectedly

keywords.name: static
keywords.description: Static storage duration or internal linkage

keywords.name: register
keywords.description: Hint to allocate variable in register (rarely used)

keywords.name: inline
keywords.description: Inline function; expand at call site

keywords.name: do
keywords.description: Do-while loop; condition checked after body

keywords.name: for
keywords.description: For loop with init, condition, increment

keywords.name: break
keywords.description: Break out of loop or switch

keywords.name: return
keywords.description: Return from function with optional value

keywords.name: sizeof
keywords.description: Get size of type or value in bytes
